{{CargoRelic
|name=Taketori Tale
|class_id=22178
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-22
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Aug 22, 912 AD, the Taketori Tale came into being, thereby creating a new writing genre.<br>Taketori Tale totals about 10 chapters, and recounts the origins of Kaguya, her impossible challenge to her five suitors, and her eventual ascension to the moon as a celestial being. As the first Japanese literary work written in kana, it unified Japan's spoken language with the written word and it pioneered a new genre of writing. It was therefore an important work in the history of Japanese literature.
|fame=50
|art=45
|fth=43
|civ=72
|tech=33
|ss1=Mutant Minion RUSH +3%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +0.9%
|ss2=Mutant Minion RUSH +4%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +1.2%
|ss3=Mutant Minion RUSH +5%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +1.5%
|ss4=Mutant Minion RUSH +7%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +2.1%
|ss5=Mutant Minion RUSH +9%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +2.7%
|ss7=Mutant Minion RUSH +9%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +2.7%<br>All Rocket Cabin production +2.1% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill II.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Dungbeetle skill II.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion DEF +4.5%
}}
